Notice Of Plaintiff'S Motion For Order Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant Inpowered, Inc., Striking Its Answer, And Entering Default Judgment Against Defendant For Failiure To Comply With September 10, 2021 Discovery Order
Off Calendar Nov-29-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ZEMANTA, INC.'S Motion For Order Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant Inpowered, Inc., Striking Its Answer, And Entering Default Judgment Against Defendant For Failiure To Comply With September 10, 2021 Discovery Order is Off calendar. Motion withdrawn.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion For Order That The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions Including Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Aug-30-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ZEMANTA, INC.'s Motion For Order That The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions Including Attorneys Fees.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Zemanta Inc.'s ("Zemanta's") Motion for Order that the Genuineness of Documents and Truth of Facts be Admitted and Compelling Responses to Interrogatories and Production of Documents is GRANTED as UNOPPOSED. Prevailing party Zemanta's request for monetary sanctions in the amount of $1185 against Defendant Inpowered Inc. (but not against Inpowered Inc's attorney) is GRANTED as UNOPPOSED. All other sanctions, if any, are DENIED.

Zamata shall prepare a form of the order recapitulating the Court's ruling, timely comply with Cal. R. Ct. 3.1312, and submit the proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem at drobbins@tongrobbins.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
